shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom condo in East Bayfront with open layout, balcony, and underground parking.
fullDescription: Welcome to 39 Queens Quay East, Unit 621 in the vibrant East Bayfront neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
Pot lights and designer fixtures throughout
Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
